title: Spirograph
description: The classic drawing toy: a pen in a small gear rolling inside a big ring traces a hypotrochoid rosette. Integer tooth counts make each curve close after a set number of laps; it draws a little each frame so you watch the loops weave, and the canvas fades so successive rosettes layer into a glowing palimpsest. Ring/gear teeth, pen offset, speed, and palette are live and audio-mappable (beats hurry the pen).
